title: SchemaChanges
description: A summary of schema changes between two versions of a schema.

RegistryChanges.description: A summary of changes to the registry of signals and attributes.

attribute_changes.description: Changes across the registry of attributes.

attribute_group_changes.description: Changes across the registry of attribute groups.

entity_changes.description: Changes across the registry of entities.

event_changes.description: Changes across the registry of events.

metric_changes.description: Changes across the registry of metrics.

span_changes.description: Changes across the registry of spans.

SchemaItemChange.description: Represents the different types of changes that can occur between two versions of a schema. This covers changes such as adding, removing, renaming, and deprecating telemetry objects (attributes, metrics, etc.).

oneOf.description: A top-level telemetry object (e.g., attribute, metric, etc.) was added to the head registry.

name.description: The name of the added telemetry object.

oneOf.description: A top-level telemetry object from the baseline registry was renamed in the head registry.

new_name.description: The new name of the telemetry object that has been renamed.

old_name.description: The old name of the telemetry object that has been renamed.

oneOf.description: One or more fields in a top-level telemetry object have been updated in the head registry. Note: This is a placeholder for future use.
A top-level telemetry object that is now discontinued without a valid replacement in the head registry.

name.description: The name of the obsoleted telemetry object.

note.description: A deprecation note providing further context.

oneOf.description: A placeholder for complex or unclear schema changes that do not fit into existing types. This type serves as a fallback when no specific category applies, with the expectation that some of these changes will be reclassified into more precise schema types in the future.

name.description: The name of the uncategorized telemetry object.

oneOf.description: A top-level telemetry object from the baseline registry was removed in the head registry.

name.description: The name of the removed telemetry object.
